inputs.label: Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total hours machine has been operating

businessContext_i18n.de: Einhaltung der vorbeugenden Wartung (0-1, 1 = vollständig eingehalten)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Conformité de la maintenance préventive (0-1, 1 = totalement conforme)
businessContext_i18n.es: Cumplimiento del mantenimiento preventivo (0-1, 1 = totalmente conforme)

inputs.label: Coefficient: Maintenance Score
inputs.businessContext: Effect of maintenance compliance on log hazard (negative reduces hazard)

businessContext_i18n.en: Effect of maintenance compliance on log hazard (negative reduces hazard)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bakım uyumunun log tehlike üzerindeki etkisi (negatif, tehlikeyi azaltır)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Effet de la conformité de maintenance sur le log du risque (négatif réduit le risque)
businessContext_i18n.es: Efecto del cumplimiento de mantenimiento sobre el log-hazard (negativo reduce el riesgo)
